items.title: Camper Accidentaly Discovers Ancient Meteor Crater on Google Maps
items.summary: When Joël Lapointe was planning an epic camping trip through the Côte-Nord region of Quebec on Google Maps, an area gave him pause for thought: it looked like a giant meteor crater. [Read More]

items.summary: Flashbacks. Oh, how many discussions they can spark! Some people hate them, others value them a lot. There are filmmakers who are famous for their use of flashbacks, and others who lose the audience’s…
